chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 440 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3756/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.3757/2018. 02.04.2026 Mr. Khalid Mahmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant. On 19.03.2026 following order was passed: “19.03.2026 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant. This matter is pending since 2018 without any significant progress. The issue is encapsulated in paragraphs 12 and 13 of the impugned judgment. Per learned counsel the issue pertain to baggage however clause 3 (c) of the SRO 886 appears to exclude the same from the purview of relevant adjudication. Learned counsel to assist. To come up on 02.04.2026.” Today learned counsel places a copy of judgment reported as 2016 PTD 470 on record and states that question proposed even otherwise been decided against the applicant department by virtue thereof and states that in view of the same, the reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
